hooks.command: grep -rn 'AKIA\|sk-\|ghp_\|password\s*=\|SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\s*=\|GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY\s*=' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in file' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo '## CRITICAL CONTEXT — PRESERVE ACROSS COMPACTION
- Project: Woodworking Sidekick | Stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Vercel AI SDK, Gemini, Supabase, Tailwind + shadcn/ui
- Test: npm test | Lint: npx prettier --write . && npx eslint --fix . | Types: npx tsc --noEmit
- Key: Structured JSON plans (WoodworkingPlan schema), multi-layer validation (Zod + woodworking rules), tool profile adaptation, wood movement awareness
- Architecture: App Router → Server Actions → Vercel AI SDK → Gemini | Supabase (Auth + Postgres + RLS)
- Current task: check docs/TASKS.md for active work'
